overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a vibrant flower-filled meadow. The character moves steadily through the colorful landscape, passing wildlife and approaching a lone tree on a hill with mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: vibrant flower meadow with winding river

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense fields of purple and yellow flowers alongside a river

entered.detail: dense carpet of purple cosmos flowers covering the ground
patches of yellow flowers mixed with the purple blooms
winding river flowing through the meadow on the right side
misty mountains visible on the horizon
tree-covered hills rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast open meadow filled with dense purple and yellow flowers under a clear blue sky. A river winds through the right side of the frame while distant mountains and forested hills create a scenic backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed grassland with bamboo forest edge

events.description: deer appears standing in the flower field to the left of the path
terrain shifts from dense flowers to mixed grass with scattered blooms

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the deer through mixed terrain with bamboo forest on the left

notable_agents.action: deer standing in the flowers watching the character pass by

entered.detail: tall green grass replacing the dense flower coverage
dense bamboo grove forming the left boundary of the field

segments.scene_description: The character passes a deer standing in the flowers on the left while the terrain transitions to mixed grassland. A bamboo forest becomes prominent on the left side as the river disappears from view behind the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with rock outcrops and lone tree

events.description: large rock formations appear on the right side of the path
sun becomes visible behind the lone tree creating a golden backlight effect

agents.ego_description: walking uphill toward the lone tree silhouetted against the bright sun

entered.detail: large gray boulders and rock outcrops lining the right side of the path
solitary twisted tree standing on the hilltop ahead
bright sun creating lens flare behind the lone tree

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grassy hillside with large rock formations on the right, approaching a lone tree silhouetted against the sun. The lighting shifts to a golden backlight as the sun becomes visible, while the bamboo forest and flower fields fade into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant flower-filled meadow that gradually ascends into a sun-drenched hillside. It begins with the character walking through a vast expanse of purple and yellow flowers under a clear blue sky, with a winding river flowing along the right side against a backdrop of distant mountains. As the character progresses, the river disappears from view and the terrain shifts toward mixed grassland, passing a deer on the left as a dense bamboo forest emerges. The scene then opens up as the character climbs a grassy slope flanked by large rock formations, leaving the forests and flower fields behind. Finally, the camera approaches a lone tree silhouetted against the horizon as the lighting transforms into a warm, golden backlight from the visible sun.
